content.en:
Ye Tian stared at the little bit of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold in his hand and breathed a sigh of relief.

A piece of Celestial Vein Demon Gold Ore was very large, about several cubic meters, and this Celestial Vein Demon Gold was only the size of a sesame seed, and it took him a long time to extract.

I have to say that if the cultivation is not at the high level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, it is really difficult to extract the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

However, it can still be extracted.

In the long years that followed, Ye Tian continued to extract the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, and after he killed the high-level demon seed Kailin, the other party had the extracted Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, and the amount was also quite large.

Therefore, he accumulated more and more Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

One Billion Solstice Era!

Tens of billions of solstice era!

50 billion to the Dao Era!

After such a long period of time, Ye Tiancai finally extracted these "Four Six" Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore, and in the later stage, he directly used six or seven replica bodies to extract Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore together.

"So much Heavenly Vein Demon Gold should be enough!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

With so much Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, plus other materials he obtained, refining a weapon suitable for the use of high-level realm gods was naturally more than enough.

However, he didn't have that kind of weapon forging method.

According to his understanding, the weapons suitable for the use of high-level realm gods are called supreme realm soldiers, and supreme realm soldiers are not just refined and can be refined, if there is no complete forging method, the random mixing of some materials to refine is often waste, but will waste those materials, and the loss will be great.

"It's a pity that this high-level demon seed doesn't have the forging method of the Supreme Realm Soldier on his body, maybe he didn't have the materials together, but he didn't have the complete forging method of the Supreme Realm Soldier!" Ye Tian guessed.

Of course.

There is no method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldier, and it is not impossible to forge it, and it still has a very low success rate.

It is said that the forging method of the real Supreme Realm Soldier was originally refined indiscriminately, and the forging method that was successfully refined was recorded and became the true forging method of the Supreme Realm Soldier.

It can be said that the method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldier at the beginning was all practiced.

And Ye Tian didn't have so many materials, so he naturally didn't dare to try it casually.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he wanted to buy a complete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, it would be almost impossible, and no force would sell it.

And the forces that really have the forging method of the Supreme Realm Soldiers are almost all top forces, these top forces are extremely rich, where will they trade with him!

However, if you trade some broken Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, you may be able to buy it.

......

Subsequently.

Ye Tian instructed the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce to trade the forging method of the Supreme Realm soldiers, and the incomplete ones also to.

The Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce went to all parts of the Eastern Wu Realm to acquire such a crippled Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, as for when it could be acquired, Ye Tian didn't know, so he could only wait silently.

However, not long after, Ye Tian received the news that the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce had acquired a broken Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, but the defect was quite severe, so it was successfully traded without using too many resources, and it was delivered to Ye Tian's hands as soon as possible.

"It is indeed the method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldiers, but the mutilation is too powerful, the key forging content is gone, and there is only a little incomplete information!"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

Such a mutilated method of forging supreme realm soldiers, even if it is deduced, it is impossible to deduce a complete method of forging supreme realm soldiers!

However, the Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce is still acquiring the Incomplete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, and it will definitely be able to acquire it.

If he accumulates a lot of incomplete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, it will definitely be of great use to him, and then there will be hope that he will be able to deduce the true and complete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method.

Really.

In the years that followed, the Terran Saint Kingdom Chamber of Commerce acquired a broken Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method, most of which came from those middle forces, and a few from powerful forces.

After a long time, the Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce had already acquired eighteen incomplete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Methods, and all of them were sent to Ye Tian's hands.

These methods of forging supreme realm soldiers vary in degree of incompleteness, but there is no doubt that they are all very mutilated, and there are even methods of forging supreme realm soldiers that are deliberately mutilated, but those forces want to earn more resources, but they deliberately do not give a complete inheritance.......

Of course.

Ye Tian wanted these methods of forging Supreme Realm Soldiers just for reference, so he didn't care about the degree of incompleteness.

"So many incomplete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Methods should be enough for me to use the Tianyan Roulette Wheel to deduce a truly complete Supreme Realm Soldier Forging Method!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

"Start deducing!"

Ye Tian took out the Eternal Realm Treasure Tianyan Roulette Wheel and began to deduce.

The Eternal Realm Treasure deduced the method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldiers, and it must be very difficult and the price to pay was very great. []

But Ye Tian still paid all the costs to deduce, and he estimated that he would still be able to deduce.

Time passes.

Ye Tian sacrificed one copy body after another, and deduced it little by little, it consumed a lot of resources, after all, every time he condensed the copy body, he had to consume a lot of resources.

However, he gradually became more and more aware of the method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldiers, and the efficiency of deduction was naturally improving.

At this moment, he was naturally full of confidence in deducing the method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldier.

It is about enough to deduce more than 10 billion years to the Dao era.

Finally, Ye Tiantui's performance came.

0.8 [The Method of Forging the Supreme Realm Soldier - Tianyan Gun!]

Ye Tian named this deduced gun Tianyan Gun, once it was forged, it would definitely be extremely powerful.

Of course.

The forging method of the Tianyan spear he deduced was not the same as the normal forging method of the Supreme Realm Soldier, it was more biased towards the demon seed, because he needed to use the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, and it had to be a large amount of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

In fact, some of the Supreme Realm soldiers on this side of the Realm God Realm were also mixed with a small amount of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, and after forging, the substances in the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold that were unfavorable to the Boundary God were burned out, and there was no harm to the high-level Realm God.

But Ye Tian is mobilizing a large amount of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, if the high-level realm god dares to use the Tianyan Spear, the Eternal Dao Seed is not a perfect Eternal Dao Seed, if it is urged for a long time, it will inevitably turn into a demon seed.
